message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Real/Imag primitives

Add 22 oracle tests for Real and Imag primitives on complex tensors.
Tests cover Complex64 and Complex128 inputs with validation of:
- Pure real, pure imaginary, and mixed complex numbers
- Zero and negative values
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Mathematical properties (magnitude, conjugate relationships)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
